title: Modded Discs Remastered
description: Just my take on replacing the music on the modded music discs
body:
Replaces the music from modded music discs with music of my choice.
## [More Music Discs](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-music-discs)
| Original | Replacement | 
| - | - | 
| `Redstonian [Emboar] - 42` | `Leon Riskin - Sonata for The Fallen` |
| `Redstonian [Emboar] - Aether` | `Vladimir Nagorniy - Street Musician` |
| `Starshine Animatics - Aggression Egression` | `From Grotto, Niilo Takalainen - Torni` |
| `Redstonian [Emboar] - Alternate Dimension` | `Masafumi Takada - Beautiful Days` |
| `Someone - BEFORE` | `Koji Kondo - Slider` |
| `Firch - Chop` | `scntfc - The Man in Black` |
| `beaniefrog - Dear Diary` | `Manaka Kataoka, Atsuko Asahi - 11 PM` |


<details>
<summary>Описание на русском</summary>
Заменяет музыку из пластинок модификаций на музыку моего выбора.
  
## [More Music Discs](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-music-discs)

| - | - |

| `Redstonian [Emboar] — Aether` | `Владимир Нагорный — Street Musician` |
| `Starshine Animatics — Aggression Egression` | `From Grotto, Ниило Такалайнен — Torni` |
| `Redstonian [Emboar] — Alternate Dimension` | `Масафуми Такада — Beautiful Days` |
| `Someone — BEFORE` | `Кодзи Кондо — Slider` |
| `Firch — Chop` | `scntfc — The Man in Black` |
| `beaniefrog — Dear Diary` | `Manaka Kataoka, Atsuko Asahi — 11 PM` |
